name: killing-the-legends-the-lethal-danger-of-celebrity
description: Bill O'Reilly and Martin Dugard's 'Killing the Legends: The Lethal Danger of Celebrity' — the deaths of Elvis Presley, John Lennon, and Muhammad Ali. Fame as a destructive force. Each legend reached the peak, then fell. The inner circle, the isolation, the addictions, the violence. Celebrity killed them.
